catalogFeedAccounting.note: Public-safe accounting confirms each catalog row is exported as a project, exported as a redacted suppression, or flagged without exposing omitted repo names.

portfolioCompatibility.note: Compatibility snapshot for the downstream portfolio feed importer; normal consumers should use payload.projects and ignore unknown additive fields.

codeScanning.reason: Detected repository languages do not include a current CodeQL-supported source language.

scorecardAlertPosture.note: Scorecard alert posture is informational and does not fail profile sync when the code-scanning alerts API is unavailable.

generatedPrCredentialDecision.rationale: The manual generated-PR job already scopes write privileges to actions:write, contents:write, and pull-requests:write; enabling the repository setting avoids adding a long-lived automation secret.
generatedPrCredentialDecision.nextAction: Enable the repository Actions pull-request creation setting, rerun hosted write-pr, and verify generated pull-request creation plus branch-scoped validation before required-check enforcement.

generatedPrDryRunEvidence.evidenceSummary: Manual hosted dry-run completed Regenerate profile, summary, artifact upload, and Preview pull request after workflow artifact-runtime and summary-size guard updates. The helper planned automation/profile-sync-27084524165 without creating a branch, commit, push, pull request, or validation dispatch.
generatedPrDryRunEvidence.nextAction: Keep refreshing this evidence after dry-run workflow changes; continue resolving live PR delivery and required-check preconditions before enforcement.

generatedPrWriteEvidence.blocker: GITHUB_TOKEN cannot read the repository Actions workflow-permissions endpoint during helper preflight.
generatedPrWriteEvidence.evidenceSummary: Manual hosted write-pr drill after enabling the repository setting regenerated the profile and uploaded the report artifact, then failed before branch creation because the helper treated GITHUB_TOKEN's 403 on repos/SysAdminDoc/SysAdminDoc/actions/permissions/workflow as fatal. No generated branch, pull request, or validation dispatch was created.
generatedPrWriteEvidence.nextAction: Rerun write-pr with the helper fallback that continues past the known workflow-permissions endpoint 403 and deletes the generated branch if pull-request creation fails after a push.

items.summary: Candidate required-check names are defined and must stay stable.
items.nextAction: Keep required-check job names unique and unchanged before enabling enforcement.

items.summary: Candidate workflows must create checks for pull requests and merge queue runs.
items.nextAction: Fix missing pull_request or merge_group triggers before making any check required.

items.summary: Each required check must have a recent successful run in this repository before it can be selected.
items.evidence: GitHub required-status-check selection depends on recent successful checks in the target repository.
items.nextAction: Open or refresh a disposable PR immediately before enforcement and verify every candidate check completes.

items.summary: Direct-main delivery must be replaced by PR delivery or a documented bypass before enforcement.
items.evidence: Hosted write-pr drill 27086351848 showed GITHUB_TOKEN cannot read the repository workflow-permissions endpoint, so the helper must continue to gh pr create when that specific preflight read is unavailable.
items.nextAction: Rerun generated PR delivery with the preflight-unavailable fallback and verify gh pr create plus validation dispatch.

items.summary: Choose branch protection or a repository ruleset only after PR delivery is ready.
items.evidence: Live branch-protection and ruleset state must be validated before selecting an enforcement mechanism.
items.nextAction: After PR delivery is proven, enable one enforcement mechanism and re-query branch protection/rulesets.

releasePolicy.releaseCreationGate: Create a GitHub release/tag only for user-visible public profile milestones or explicit operator request.
releasePolicy.nextAction: Keep reporting the release/tag gap as warning-only evidence until a public milestone is intentionally cut or the repo switches to per-version releases.

profileReleaseConsistency.note: Warning-only comparison of the planning-doc version against the profile repository's latest GitHub release and matching tag ref.

readmeDensity.portfolioOnlyCandidateSelectionPolicy: Review non-featured, non-currently-building repo-only rows that still have portfolio routes; sort by stars, release availability, age, category order, and repo name.

portfolioOnlyPreview.note: Report-only preview; catalog, README, and projects feed output are not mutated by this section.
